name: Pineapple/ Cranberry Dump Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package SnackWell's or low fat white cake mix
1 can crushed pineapple in juice, (20 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the undrained pineapple into a baking pan.
2. Spread the pineapple evenly over the bottom of the pan.
3. Spread the cranberry sauce evenly over the pineapple layer.
4. Sprinkle the cake mix over the cranberry sauce layer.
5. Spread the cake mix evenly over the top of the fruit layers.
6. Dot the top with small pieces of margarine.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 48 to 53 minutes.
8. Serve warm or chilled.
